snippet: Email address anianvekar@gmail.com Hi Anita, As per our discussion I now attach the price for your garage conversion. Remove up and over garage door, build new dwarf wall to suit new PVC double glazed
subject: Quotation for garage conversion
plain_content:
Email address anianvekar@gmail.com
Hi Anita,
As per our discussion I now attach the price for your garage conversion.

Remove up and over garage door, build new dwarf wall to suit new PVC double
glazed window.

Create new opening between the hallway of the existing house and the
garage, fit new door and frame, baton the garage walls with 3 X 2 batons
and fit new plasterboard to the walls.

Build new cabinet to house the electric meter and main fuse, build cabinet
to house the existing gas boiler, fit doors to the underside of the stairs
in the garage to create a storage cupboard.

Install 6. Double sockets, 6 Low voltage LED energy saving down lights ,
fit new radiator in garage.

Fit new laminate floor in the garage

Total price for the above
13,450.00
markdown_content:
Email address [anianvekar@gmail.com](mailto:anianvekar@gmail.com)

Hi Anita,

As per our discussion I now attach the price for your garage conversion.

  

Remove up and over garage door, build new dwarf wall to suit new PVC double glazed window.

  

Create new opening between the hallway of the existing house and the garage, fit new door and frame, baton the garage walls with 3 X...(content truncated)...ld new cabinet to house the electric meter and main fuse, build cabinet to house the existing gas boiler, fit doors to the underside of the stairs in the garage to create a storage cupboard. 

  

Install 6. Double sockets, 6 Low voltage LED energy saving down lights , fit new radiator in garage.

  

Fit new laminate floor in the garage

  

Total price for the above

13,450.00

build it is a lot of work.

So for the time being we are going to use Chester as the go to person for

Thanks for all the hard work and input up to now I am available if anyone

Any questions please come back to me.

Regards,
Darryl

Hi Paul,
Thank you for applying for one of our positions on Juro.

I didn’t get back to you because of the uncertainty with COVID but now that
there is some light at the end of the tunnel, and the fact that we are so
busy, it might be a good time to have a chat. We have two companies the
other being Handyman4U.com which willlaunch in two weeks time.

If you drop me an email letting me know when your available I’ll give you a
call to discuss moving forward. Or you can call me on 07923121033

Regards,
David

subject: Emerald green construction web and  social media launch
plain_content:
Hi all,
We have now all agreed on the following plan for emerald green construction.

The Christmas animation will go up this week on social media. We are going
to do some Facebook ads now for recruitment which will be rolled out this
week Wednesday latest.

On the 3rd of January Laura will start placing FB  adverts ptomoting the
company and stating the type of work we do, ...(content truncated)...
It’s crucial that the above happens or we are going to have a very
difficult start to the new year trying to get work. But if it happens as
above my phone will start hopping on the 3rd of January. Chester can you
have a look over the website with Yvonne to make sure there’s no
grammatical or spelling errors before we start getting traffic through.



Regards,
D
markdown_content:
Hi all,

We have now all agreed on the following plan for emerald green construction.

  

The Christmas animation will go up this week on social media. We are going to do some Facebook ads now for recruitment which will be rolled out this week Wednesday latest. 

  

On the 3rd of January Laura will start placing FB  adverts ptomoting the company and stating the type of work ...(content truncated)...It’s crucial that the above happens or we are going to have a very difficult start to the new year trying to get work. But if it happens as above my phone will start hopping on the 3rd of January. Chester can you have a look over the website with Yvonne to make sure there’s no grammatical or spelling errors before we start getting traffic through.

  

  

  

Regards,

D

snippet: Darryl, You certainly did purchase any patent rights that existed as of the bankruptcy filing date from the trustee. However, did you ever secure that actual patents? Intellectual property rights is
subject: RE: Intellectual theft
plain_content:
Darryl,

You certainly did purchase any patent rights that existed as of the bankruptcy filing date from the trustee.  However, did you ever secure that actual patents?  Intellectual property rights is certainly not my specialty, but it would appear to me that you would need to have secured the patents to have a case for infringement.

Art

Arthur G. Baumeister, Jr.
Partner...(content truncated)...he first one is owned by a guy that was an agent when I was In The states called Jon Aneson and he was privy to a lot of our technical information, all I can get about the second one is that it’s a guy called Gary and he is saying he invented the product, which is very frustrating and annoying.

You might let me know what you think.

Regards,
Darryl


Sent from my iPad
markdown_content:
Darryl,

You certainly did purchase any patent rights that existed as of the bankruptcy filing date from the trustee.  However, did you ever secure that actual patents?  Intellectual property rights is certainly not my specialty, but it would appear to me that you would need to have secured the patents to have a case for infringement.

Art

Arthur G. Baumeister, Jr.

Partn...(content truncated).../)

The first one is owned by a guy that was an agent when I was In The states called Jon Aneson and he was privy to a lot of our technical information, all I can get about the second one is that it’s a guy called Gary and he is saying he invented the product, which is very frustrating and annoying.

You might let me know what you think.

Regards,

Darryl

  
Sent from my iPad

snippet: Hi Dominic, Hope you are well, I was informed that Jon Aneson and another company have registered a patent (pending) for a soda gun cleaning system, which is a pure rip off of Bev Dok, I have informed
subject: Bev Dok
plain_content:
Hi Dominic,
Hope you are well, I was informed that Jon Aneson and another company have registered a patent (pending) for a soda gun cleaning system, which is a pure rip off of Bev Dok, I have informed both of these companies that they are in breach of the intellectual rights of Bev Dok, furthermore I believee that Dema engineering developed one of these products based on information they received relating to Bev Dok, what I don’t understand is how they can get a patent when we spent a huge amount of money and we were refused a patent numerous times. I would appreciate if you could shed some light on this please.
https://barguncleaner.com/
https://www.sodagunjetter.com/

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh
markdown_content:
Hi Dominic,

Hope you are well, I was informed that Jon Aneson and another company have registered a patent (pending) for a soda gun cleaning system, which is a pure rip off of Bev Dok, I have informed both of these companies that they are in breach of the intellectual rights of Bev Dok, furthermore I believee that Dema engineering developed one of these products based on information they received relating to Bev Dok, what I don’t understand is how they can get a patent when we spent a huge amount of money and we were refused a patent numerous times. I would appreciate if you could shed some light on this please.

[https://barguncleaner.com/](https://barguncleaner.com/)

[https://www.sodagunjetter.com/](https://www.sodagunjetter.com/)  
  

Regards,

Darryl Kavanagh

snippet: Hi Jim, Just dropping you a mail to ask a quick question, can you tell me if Dema are involved with Jon Aneson in relation to a product that is a violation of Bev Dok and certain intellectual
subject: Violation of intellectual property
plain_content:
> Hi Jim,
> Just dropping you a mail to ask a quick question, can you tell me if Dema are involved with Jon Aneson in relation to a product that is a violation of Bev Dok and certain intellectual information that was shared with you.
> 
> I’m not sure if your aware but I bought the rights to the product from my assignee in bankruptcy and all those rights are recognised by the courts of New York.
> 
> I would appreciate if you could come back to me when you get a chance.
I have copied in Arthur Baumeister my solicitor in the USA who will confirm the above.
> 
> Regards,
> Darryl Kavanagh

Sent from my iPad
markdown_content:
> Hi Jim,  
> Just dropping you a mail to ask a quick question, can you tell me if Dema are involved with Jon Aneson in relation to a product that is a violation of Bev Dok and certain intellectual information that was shared with you.  
>   
> I’m not sure if your aware but I bought the rights to the product from my assignee in bankruptcy and all those rights are recognised by the courts of New York.  
>   
> I would appreciate if you could come back to me when you get a chance.  

I have copied in Arthur Baumeister my solicitor in the USA who will confirm the above.  

>   
> Regards,  
> Darryl Kavanagh

  

Sent from my iPad

snippet: Hi David, Happy new year, I had my solicitor Chris Barber on this morning saying he can't get hold of you for a witness statement for my upcoming case against Alan Darlow. As you know I have named
subject: Witness
plain_content:
Hi David,
Happy new year, I had my solicitor Chris Barber on this morning saying he can’t get hold of you for a witness statement for my upcoming case against Alan Darlow.

As you know I have named you as a witness and I have submitted various documentation from you as evidence, as it stands this case is going to be extremely damaging for Alan Darlow and when all the facts ...(content truncated)...

I’m sure you, or your company don’t want to be associated with Mr Darlow’s actions as it would b extremely damaging, all I am asking you to do is give the facts and the truth in your witness statement.

Can you please get back to Chris Barber as soon as possible, the statements have to be in by Friday at 4 pm.


Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh

Sent from my iPad

snippet: Cryptocurrency market on brink of 'price explosion' but bitcoin won't trigger it, experts predict The Independent In November 2017, bitcoin was in the middle of a remarkable price surge
subject: The Independent: Cryptocurrency market on brink of 'price explosion' but bitcoin won't trigger it, experts predict
plain_content:
Cryptocurrency market on brink of 'price explosion' but bitcoin won't trigger it, experts predict
The Independent

In November 2017, bitcoin was in the middle of a remarkable price surge that would see its value rise 10-fold over the course of six months. By mid-December, one bitcoin was worth close to $20,000 (£15,000), but that was the high water mark before the tide turned. Read the full story


Shared from Apple News



Regards,
markdown_content:
**Cryptocurrency market on brink of 'price explosion' but bitcoin won't trigger it, experts predict**  
The Independent

In November 2017, bitcoin was in the middle of a remarkable price surge that would see its value rise 10-fold over the course of six months. By mid-December, one bitcoin was worth close to $20,000 (£15,000), but that was the high water mark before the tide turned. [Read the full story](https://apple.news/AKzuOSLDMQly53pDqkQALDA)

snippet: Hi Chris, As discussed I am trying to put together the funds for the hearing next Tuesday, I should have confirmation tomorrow, you might let me know if you have spoken to Owen and if he is free.
subject: Opinion
plain_content:
Hi Chris,
As discussed I am trying to put together the funds for the hearing next Tuesday, I should have confirmation tomorrow, you might let me know if you have spoken to Owen and if he is free.

Secondly I believe that while the opinion from Dan Rogers is positive I do believe that he fundamentally missed the point that David Williams was not acting as a surveyor but as the au...(content truncated)...t”. Rich and Starke JJ. observed (1921) 29 CLR, at pp 184, 185 that this did not make the signing of a contract a condition of agreement, but made it a condition of the obligation to pay, and carried a necessary implication that each party would sign a contract in accordance with the terms of agreement. Their Honours, agreeing with Knox

Regards,
Darryl

Sent from my iPad

snippet: Jon, You might let me know how on earth you think you can take my intellectual property and launch a product that is a complete rip off of bev dok. Because of our collaboration you were made privy to
subject: Violation of our agreement
to: "JON ANESON PRES/CEO OF SEA HAWK SYSTEMS" <Jon@seahawk-systems.com>
plain_content:
Jon,
You might let me know how on earth you think you can take my intellectual property and launch a product that is a complete rip off of bev dok. 

Because of our collaboration you were made privy to intellectual rights and developments which cost me a lot of Money to develop, you have taken this and as I see it are launching a product that directly conflicts with my vision. 

I would be most obliged if you would clarify what your intentions are before I seek legal advice.

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh

snippet: Hi Emma, Sorry for the late reply I'm away for a couple of days with Diana. I see david sent you his statement. I'm happy for you to make the offer the only reservation I have is that I would
subject: Offer
plain_content:
Hi Emma,
Sorry for the late reply I’m away for a couple of days with Diana. I see david sent you his statement.

I’m happy for you to make the offer the only reservation I have is that I would prefer if I had until the end of January to pay the balance given everything that’s going on at the moment and to be on the safe side.

Also didn’t we agree that we were only paying for the apartment up to the time I moved out? If that’s the case we need to deduct the extra weeks that he charged me for.

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: Hi Emma, Ok great, this is no problem whatsoever. The first issue came in the summer when we were not able to use our balcony, the front of the apartment is glass and catches the sun for most of the
subject: No subject
plain_content:
Hi Emma,


Ok great, this is no problem whatsoever.


The first issue came in the summer when we were not able to use our balcony, the front of the apartment is glass and catches the sun for most of the morning and day, it was very claustrophobic and the balcony was a key feature to this apartment.


As Winter came it was the complete opposite in the apartment, it was real...(content truncated)...always really friendly and outgoing.


The first time we met Justin who was acting on behalf of the landlord we told him about the difficulties we encountered and how the landlord was handling the whole situation, he inspected the apartment, he was perfectly happy and told us that the apartment was in perfect condition, subsequently Justin and my Dad made a deal and shook hands.

I have informed Neil Hotchkiss from BMS funding that you are transferring the funds for councils opinion first thing Tuesday morning and on the basis of this he is happy to get Chris Barber from Robertson’s solicitors to instruct council to proceed today.

The bank details for Robertson’s solicitors are as follows.

Barclays 
Sort code 20-18-58
Acc number 03469514
Amount £3,000

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: David, Basically a company called grupo Vitalex were to arrange a bond for me, I transferred €425000 as the deposit for the bond, the company never arranged the bond and tried to steal the money, my
subject: Overview
plain_content:
David,
Basically a company called grupo Vitalex were to arrange a bond for me, I transferred €425,000 as the deposit for the bond, the company never arranged the bond and tried to steal the money, my lawyer in Madrid Daniel Villar of Lexton global managed to freeze funds belonging to one of the people involved, when these people were charged the judge ordered that I get back ...(content truncated)...had as evidence which was in English be translated to Spanish before the money was released. 

This has now been done it is only a matter of the prosecutor authorising the release of my money. If someone could get to the prosecutor and appeal to her explaining how important it is that we get this money released and that this is going on nearly 7 years now.
 

Sent from my iPad

snippet: Hi Chris, I have read the submission from Darlow's legal team regarding security of costs and I would reply as follows. It seems to me that they are presenting reasons to the court that have
subject: Hearing Monday
plain_content:
Hi Chris,
I have read the submission from Darlow’s legal team regarding security of costs and I would reply as follows.

It seems to me that they are presenting reasons to the court that have already been dealt with, as you are aware and can confirm to the court, the Terry Rogers and Corcoran were fictitious stat demands that were created purely to muddy the waters and cast...(content truncated)...n and he said that he has sent you through the forms to fill out which will ensure that the costs for our side and Darlow’s will be available, naturally I want to avoid securing Darlow’s costs as there is a cost to me, if we can avoid this it reduces the amount that I will have to put up as security.

Have a nice weekend and see you on Monday at 9.30

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: Hi, I previously reported equipment stolen from my restaurant seafood shack in Cardiff, I met with police officers at the restaurant and showed them CCTV footage of the person stealing the equipment
subject: Theft of equipment from Seafood Shack Cardiff
plain_content:
Hi,
I previously reported equipment stolen from my restaurant seafood shack in Cardiff, I met with police officers at the restaurant and showed them CCTV footage of the person stealing the equipment and cash, and I also identified the person that committed the crime. I was told by the police that attended the scene that it was a civil offence and the police couldn’t do anythi...(content truncated)...t meeting he pointed out that this is a police not a civil matter as it is the theft of goods and was quiet surprised at the information I was given by the police 

I would really appreciate it if someone could contact me to do something as a matter of urgency my number is 07923 121033 I have also copied in Vaughan Gething in this mail at his request.

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh

snippet: Hi Daniel, Sorry to bother you but I am being put under huge pressure from Cerebus now, I was wondering if you have any news from the prosecutor about the release of the funds. Also if you have any
subject: Last email and David
plain_content:
Hi Daniel,
Sorry to bother you but I am being put under huge pressure from Cerebus now, I was wondering if you have any news from the prosecutor about the release of the funds. 

Also if you have any contacts in Barcelona that could give David a job for the next two months while he is on placement from college I would really appreciate it, he has a lot of experience in bar and restaurant work and as I said he would be an asset to anyone he works with.

Best Regards,
Darryl

snippet: Chris, It has come to my attention that Darlow has sold the building 5a high sr, I did warn you that he might do this. The restaurant is completely stripped all my equipment and everything else is gon
subject: Sale
plain_content:
Chris,
It has come to my attention that Darlow has sold the building 5a high sr, I did warn you that he might do this. The restaurant is completely stripped all my equipment and everything else is gone. Please reflect on this and maybe you can give me options today in relation to my rights, it’s not acceptable that this can happen to anyone, and I have really taken enough of being walked on and the system leaving me down. I will see you at 1.30.

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: My family and I have been in the Bar & Restaurant business all my life my parents had bars and a small hotels, I have a passion for the business and the one thing that has always struck me is how
subject: Editorial
plain_content:
My family and I have been in the Bar & Restaurant business all my life my parents had bars and a small hotels, I have a passion for the business and the one thing that has always struck me is how badly the Irish pub concept is put together overseas compared to the authentic Irish pub culture that you see in Ireland, I have conceptualised various bars over the years and where there ...(content truncated)..., and where possible and building controls allow we will thatch the roofs of our bars and restaurants which will be part of our USP and identity to create the ultimate Irish pub experience, and a multi million dollar business. We plan to have our own training academy within year twofold ensure that our staff deliver the highest standards of service and product.

Sent from my iPad

snippet: Hi, I took a lease on the property 5a High Street, Cardiff in February 2017 in the name of Seafood Shack Ltd I personally invested in excess of £200000 and Diana Ellis my (now) partner invested £70000
subject: Lease mistake
plain_content:
Hi,
I took a lease on the property 5a High Street, Cardiff in February 2017 in the name of Seafood Shack Ltd I personally invested in excess of £200,000 and Diana Ellis my (now) partner invested £70,000 the rest of the money needed for equipment was raised through leasing and  I used companies that I have historic relationships with to carry out the works and I project manage...(content truncated)...00 based on us having a Lloyd’s policy in place to cover the transaction, I still haven’t heard anything. 

My son David’s accident hasn’t been dealt with, and I have yet to receive the deeds back for spring hill house and Oakland’s that I gave you. It’s a litany of disaster, i urge you to contact me regarding the above..

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh
markdown_content:
Hi,  

I took a lease on the property [5a High Street](x-apple-data-detectors://1), Cardiff in February 2017 in the name of Seafood Shack Ltd I personally invested in excess of £200,000 and Diana Ellis my (now) partner invested £70,000 the rest of the money needed for equipment was raised through leasing and  I used companies that I have historic relationships with to car...(content truncated)...d on us having a Lloyd’s policy in place to cover the transaction, I still haven’t heard anything.   
  
My son David’s accident hasn’t been dealt with, and I have yet to receive the deeds back for spring hill house and Oakland’s that I gave you. It’s a litany of disaster, i urge you to contact me regarding the above..

  

Regards,

Darryl Kavanagh

subject: Update
plain_content:
Hi Declan,
This guy has now come back to me and it seems that there will be a load available early next week of high end washing machines dryers and other very saleable goods, I am being pushed hard on price and transport, but he tells me we will have one of these every week to fortnight for the foreseeable future, can you do something to help me on your commission?on the basis that we will have many entries and very good ones at that.if so also please confirm that you will be able to take a load next Tuesday/Wednesday.

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: Hi Paul, I would like to thank yourself and Vaughan for meeting me today, it is great that I finally met someone who gets what has happened to us and is willing to help. I look forward to hearing from
subject: Meeting today
plain_content:
Hi Paul,
I would like to thank yourself and Vaughan for meeting me today, it is great that I finally met someone who gets what has happened to us and is willing to help. I look forward to hearing from you.

I also fully stand by what I said, I am absolutely committed to opening more Seafood Shack outlets throughout Wales and a training academy of excellence for the hospitality i...(content truncated)...d with these other individuals to defraud me of the lease on the property which I had spent in excess of £600,000.00 he replied today and stated that he never represented me personally or seafood shack limited, yet i have an email that he sent to the landlords solicitor stating that he acted for me Darryl Kavanagh personally and seafood shack.


Kind Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh
markdown_content:
Hi Paul,

I would like to thank yourself and Vaughan for meeting me today, it is great that I finally met someone who gets what has happened to us and is willing to help. I look forward to hearing from you.

  

I also fully stand by what I said, I am absolutely committed to opening more Seafood Shack outlets throughout Wales and a training academy of excellence for the hospitality...(content truncated)...th these other individuals to defraud me of the lease on the property which I had spent in excess of £600,000.00 he replied today and stated that he never represented me personally or seafood shack limited, yet i have an email that he sent to the landlords solicitor stating that he acted for me Darryl Kavanagh personally and seafood shack.

  

  

Kind Regards,

Darryl Kavanagh

subject: Amended
plain_content:
Julian,
In reply to your email of the 10/5/2018 I would respond as follows to the various points that you made.

On your clear instructions you advised that the company should not trade and that a new company would have to be incorporated and furthermore that seafood shack Cardiff ltd would need to be liquidated, you then incorporated Castlegate Ltd which was to be used for as t...(content truncated)...nally, I only refer you to your email to Jacklyn Dawson once again where you stated this clearly, you also state that I would be responsible for any fees, perhaps you might send me a complete breakdown of any work that you did, you might also let me have a complete breakdown of the payments received by you from Seafood Shack Cardiff LTD and Hale Hospitality. 


Sent from my iPad

snippet: Hi Mark, As per my call to you in January you are aware that the landlord has forfeited the lease on my restaurant at 5a High Street Cardiff. You handled this matter for me and you will recall that Ti
subject: Lease of 5A High Street Cardiff
plain_content:
Hi Mark,
As per my call to you in January you are aware that the landlord has forfeited the lease on my restaurant at 5a High Street Cardiff.

You handled this matter for me and you will recall that Tim Russen from Jacklyn Dawson the landlords solicitor contacted you on the 23rd of August 2017 to inform you that he had contacted his agent and the agent had said that he could fin...(content truncated)...we have all the evidence to win. 

I feel that there is no alternative but for you to inform your insurance company and let them fund the case otherwise there will be a much bigger problem. 

I am sure you will appreciate the position that I am in and the urgency of this matter, therefore I would appreciate it if you could get back to me as soon as possible.

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: Hi All, I'm in the process of joining IOSH Institute Of Safety and Health professional Body, and will be able to put Tech IOSH after my name replacing NEBOSH. We can also use the IOSH logo on our
subject: IOSH Professional body Membership
to: Darryl Michael Kavanagh <darryl.kavanagh.11@gmail.com>, David Kavanagh <david.kavanagh.10@hotmail.com>, Laura Kavanagh <laura@tribaldigitalmarketing.com>
plain_content:
Hi All,

I’m in the process of joining IOSH Institute Of Safety and Health professional Body, and will be able to put Tech IOSH after my name replacing NEBOSH.

snippet: Hi Amir, Here is an overview of what has happened and what I explained to you on the phone. More information has come to light since I wrote this. I took a lease on the property 5a High Street, Cardif
subject: Facts
plain_content:
Hi Amir,
Here is an overview of what has happened and what I explained to you on the phone. More information has come to light since I wrote this.

I took a lease on the property 5a High Street, Cardiff in February 2017 in the name of Seafood Shack Ltd I personally invested in excess of £200,000 and Diana Ellis my (now) partner invested £70,000 the rest of the money needed ...(content truncated)...000 and give his consent to Papa Johns taking over the lease. The others would receive a cash payment for transferring the lease on the restaurant to Papa Johns. The landlord has co conspired with all of the above to defraud Seafood Shack Ltd of its lease and defraud me and Diana Ellis out of the significant monies that we have invested in the property.





Sent from my iPad

snippet: Darryl, Thanks for your email. I have been having a look at the recent claim against you and am somewhat concerned that there is no defense. Are you able to pop in tomorrow to discuss? Any time after
subject: RE: Recent Meeting
plain_content:
Darryl,

Thanks for your email.

I have been having a look at the recent claim against you and am somewhat concerned that there is no defense.  Are you able to pop in tomorrow to discuss?  Any time after about 11am?

You mentioned an email.  Can you let me have this or bring it tomorrow?

Regards,

Chris Barber 
Solicitor

Tel: 02920 237777
DD: 02921 676101


-----...(content truncated)...ssued a new lease at a higher rent than I was paying. He also has all our equipment and £35,000.00 worth of stock which we never had a chance to get out because he didn’t issue any notice, we still don’t know what has been removed despite our requests.

You might let me know what his solicitors response is to settling when you have spoken to them.

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: Hi John, I know you met with David last week he gave me the list if information that you require, as you know I'm in the wars again over here due to trusting idiots again, I have a high court case
subject: Various
plain_content:
Hi John,
I know you met with David last week he gave me the list if information that you require, as you know I’m in the wars again over here due to trusting idiots again, I have a high court case pending and I don’t know when I will get back to Ireland but it wont be soon.

I have addressed some of the points on the list previously with Leann which is the information ...(content truncated)... whatever information that they require from Zurich, I will send you on the correspondence that John Molloy sent to them. 

Item 6 I don’t have a tax file and I’m not sure what they are referring to. I have sent you two previous email reports from John Molloy and these should address all the queries they have raised. Let me know.

Regards,
Darryl

Sent from my iPad

snippet: Hi Niall, I visited site today with David Clarke from DJI Fitout, after the site meeting I spent a
subject: Cork site
plain_content:
Hi Niall,
I visited site today with David Clarke from DJI Fitout, after the site meeting I spent a couple of hours with David going over Fitout figures, and then when I got home I went over operating costs.

To be honest I just can't make this work, the rent figures being quoted for rent are much too high, and the fact that the unit is being handed over in grey shell drives the ...(content truncated)...nd electrical first fix to the unit, the rent would have to be in the region of €200,000 per year and I would need a years free rent.

If you can get them to see some sense then I would be prepared to look at it again, but based on the present deal and figures being quoted I would respectfully have to withdraw.

Let me know if anything changes.

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh

plain_content:
Hi Darryl

I have these databases on my computer from a couple of years ago.  Only
phone numbers with a few email addresses though.

Can we use them??  Maybe send out a group text with details of Cathedral
and to tell them to log on and sign up for news etc.

What do you think??  We would probably get away with just sending out one
text.

Let me know.

I also have business databases that I started a long time ago but we'll
need to call them all to get emails and addresses.

Niamh

I have these databases on my computer from a couple of years ago.  Only phone numbers with a few email addresses though.  
  

Can we use them??  Maybe send out a group text with details of Cathedral and to tell them to log on and sign up for news etc.  
  

What do you think??  We would probably get away with just sending out one text.   
  

Let me know.  
  

I also have business databases that I started a long time ago but we'll need to call them all to get emails and addresses.  

  

Niamh

Darryl

Best regards,
Pat Dwyer.

subject: Re: Follow up
plain_content:
Hi Darryl,
Sorry for not answering but I did not see your latest email. Good to hear that there are a chance to beat this!. As spoken in August would be great if you could send me any kind of medical report. I think that this would put a lot of pressure on them.
Anyway I will phone you on monday. Would suit you to speak at around 12.00 my time, this is 11.00 your time.
Please co...(content truncated)...r I would book the appointment in the Mayo Clinic and take my chances.  They have provisionally given me a date of Friday the 5th of October.

This gives me some hope of beating this and if they think I can be treated I have some friends  who are looking at different ways of funding the treatment.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Regards,
Darryl





Regards,
[X]

snippet: Hi laura, Please find details of a case that I have taken against my landlord here is the OVERVIEW If you need anything else please do not hesitate to ask. I took a lease on the property 5a High Stree
subject: The facts to date
plain_content:
Hi laura,
Please find details of a case that I have taken against my landlord here is the OVERVIEW 
If you need anything else please do not hesitate to ask.
 
I took a lease on the property 5a High Street, Cardiff in February 2017 in the name of Seafood Shack Ltd I personally invested in excess of £200,000 and Diana Ellis my (now) partner invested £70,000 the rest of the m...(content truncated)...l of the above. I have brought this case as far as I can and have used my remaining resources to fund it to date, unfortunately because it has now been allocated to a multi track court I will not be able to fund the remainder of the case. I hope you have an interest in my case and I look forward to hearing from you.

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh
Telephone 07923 121033


Regards,

snippet: Hi Laura, Here you go xxx By now you may have heard of GDPR, we at Hydra health and safety are here to help guide you through the the new European General Data Protection Regulation. It's a comple
subject: Blog on GDPR
plain_content:
Hi Laura,
Here you go xxx


By now you may have heard of GDPR, we at Hydra health and safety are here to help guide you through the the new European General Data Protection Regulation.  It’s a complex, and evolving piece of legislation that comes into effect in May 2018.  It doesn’t matter whether your organisation has any presence in the EU, or if your only trading i...(content truncated)...  For the former, you need to start looking for in-scope data in your existing IT systems.  Like all compliance situations, the more systems you determine are not in-scope the better, because these can be excluded from your compliance activities.
Of course, finding the in-scope data is the driver for evaluating how big your GDPR effort will need to be.  

  

Sent from my iPad
markdown_content:
Hi Laura,

Here you go xxx

  

  

By now you may have heard of GDPR, we at Hydra health and safety are here to help guide you through the the new [European General Data Protection Regulation](http://pages.checkpoint.com/eu-gdpr.html).  It’s a complex, and evolving piece of legislation that comes into effect in May 2018.  It doesn’t matter whether your organisati...(content truncated)...rmer, you need to start looking for in-scope data in your existing IT systems.  Like all compliance situations, the more systems you determine are _not_ in-scope the better, because these can be excluded from your compliance activities.

Of course, finding the in-scope data is the driver for evaluating how big your GDPR effort will need to be.  

  

  

Sent from my iPad

snippet: Hi Chris, Good to see you last week hopefully things should progress quickly now. I have had a good chance to think about our conversation and to review the file and correspondence in detail, firstly
subject: Various points
plain_content:
Hi Chris,
Good to see you last week hopefully things should progress quickly now.

I have had a good chance to think about our conversation and to review the file and correspondence in detail, firstly I think with the email that was sent to Mark Walsh of Kenny Stephenson and Chapman stating that he couldn’t find the company on the register (Seafood Shack UK Ltd) on the 23-8...(content truncated)...is is not an option now as the brand will have to be rebuilt from scratch all the staff are gone the stock is gone and a business that had a turnover of £25,000 a week on average has been destroyed by the actions of Mr Darlow.

I am waiting for funds to be transferred from Ireland and once I have received those funds I will make a transfer to you as agreed.

Regards,
Darryl

snippet: The restaurant opened last June after a full refit which cost in the region of £700000 including the building being compleyely rewired and all mechanical services heating and air conditioning
subject: Campaign
plain_content:
The restaurant opened last June after a full refit which cost in the region of £700,000 including the building being compleyely rewired and all mechanical services heating and air conditioning completely replaced.

I had retained Mr Terry Rogers as operations director, he came from a very impressive background having held positions in the food and beverage industry with Hilton...(content truncated)...low the landlord to procure a new lease which he has now been issued to Rogers and other parties who have a very chequered background at a much higher rent than I had negotiated on the original lease, but with the benefit of the monies invested by myself and Diana Ellis. It is my understanding that they plan to open the restaurant over the next couple of weeks.

Sent from my iPad

Laura Taylor
Vice President of Marketing
WordStream

snippet: Hi Sean, I'm sorry to be difficult but I am just wondering why you need the Admin access. I had an experience recently where the page was taken over as I had given them admin access. I am not for
subject: Re: Seafood-Shack Marketing Proposal
plain_content:
Hi Sean,

I’m sorry to be difficult but I am just wondering why you need the Admin access. I had an experience recently where the page was taken over as I had given them admin access. I am not for one minute saying that this would be the case with you, I am just learning to be more cautious.

If this is needed I have absolutely no problem.

Also will you be sending a con...(content truncated)...let me have the log in details?
  *   Back story - full details of who, what, why, when, where etc in order to get the full back story, this will be used to create stories for the press.
  *   Idea of opening date.

If you have ANY information that you feel will help, please send it without hesitation.  I will then start to create a schedule and get this back to you to look at.

snippet: Hi Laura, As discussed previously, the search results that come up on google relating to my
subject: Google
plain_content:
Hi Laura,
As discussed previously, the search results that come up on google relating to my bankruptcy are absolutely destroying me, I have lost 4 potential business locations because of this in the last four months. 

This is something that I went through a number of years ago and it is absolutely disgraceful that I am being punished for it still. 

People have a right to get...(content truncated)... the world and the banks like everybody else. 

If you cannot get them to remove it then I will have no option to go legal and let a court see what this kind of publicity through a search engine can do to people and the way it affects them and everybody around them many years after the fact, but more importantly this is not news anymore it is history.

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh

We can u...(content truncated)...e key time for the take off of Escobars so we will make sure to do it right! 

  

Will we be taking orders over facebook or will this all be done through email?

Marketing

subject: Email addresses
plain_content:
Keith,
We need the email addresses set up ASAP as us all having different emails makes us look  unprofessional, can you get this sorted? 

Laura has all the info, we also need our FB page and twitter accounts sorted, again laura said she will do this for us, I think Elaine did something on this already. 

We need to move fast on all this stuff now as it will be important to get good momentum going on FB and Twitter.

You need to keep me in the loop on everything now!! and it would be a good idea to email me a progress report very couple of days.

Regards,
Darryl Kavanagh

snippet: Art, Thank you for your email, as you are aware this has been an extremely difficult time for myself
subject: Re: 20. DARRYL KAVANAGH - LETTER TO DEREK JOYCE AND PAUL CROTTY .docx
plain_content:
Art,
Thank you for your email, as you are aware this has been an extremely difficult time for myself and my family. If I had known that entering into an agreement with the trustee would affect my bankruptcy in any way then I would have never entered into an agreement with him.

I have been offered a job which I will start in January, if he revokes my bankruptcy I will not be abl...(content truncated)...son and chapman will confirm that we will institute proceedings if the matter is not resolved soon, unfortunately as you are well aware these matters are not resolved overnight. Please pass on my sincerest apologies to Mr Gaffney but this was totally unexpected, if he wants to put the product up for sale I understand and I will take it that the money I have paid will be my loss.
>

Booking.com - Booking loves Rome! Find out why.

snippet: Hi Niamh, Sorry for the late reply but i have been working on this business plan all night. I hope it
subject: Proposal & Business plan for 95 Merrion Sq West
plain_content:
Hi Niamh,

Sorry for the late reply but i have been working on this business plan all
night. I hope it gives you a good idea as to my vision for Merrion Sq West.
As you will see the concept is very unique and has not been tried in Dublin
or indeed Ireland before. In relation to proof of funding, my solicitor
John O Donohoe will be e-mailing you later this morning to confirm t...(content truncated)...d he would not have to worry about a long rent
free period. I hope this is acceptable and that we can move forward as soon
as possible.

The other issues that I discussed with Darragh can be addressed if the
above is acceptable.

P.S I had a problem with my own email tonight and i had to use my wife's.
If you need to contact me I will be on my own email.

Regards,
Darryl
markdown_content:
Hi Niamh,

  

Sorry for the late reply but i have been working on this business plan all night. I hope it gives you a good idea as to my vision for Merrion Sq West. As you will see the concept is very unique and has not been tried in Dublin or indeed Ireland before. In relation to proof of funding, my solicitor John O Donohoe will be e-mailing you later this morning to confirm tha...(content truncated)...d not have to worry about a long rent free period. I hope this is acceptable and that we can move forward as soon as possible. 

  

The other issues that I discussed with Darragh can be addressed if the above is acceptable.

  

P.S I had a problem with my own email tonight and i had to use my wife's. If you need to contact me I will be on my own email. 

  

Regards,

Darryl

snippet: Hi Carina Please see attached all the comps from Mantra - Oct - Feb Has you will see the comps where
subject: Mantra Comps
plain_content:
Hi Carina


 Please see attached all the comps from Mantra - Oct - Feb

Has you will see the comps where very high in December especially, this was
due to us having a €30 all in deal up in the club on Saturdays , Thursdays
for the students , we also done it on NYE in Club.

All drinks were rang up on a table then comp out , this was the only way to
do it to keep a  c...(content truncated)...ang up has open drink. All was signed off by Darryl on the night
and Colm confirmed the open drink total to the stock taker

The breakdown of all these transactions can be seen on the relevant cash
sheets for the nights in question, there is also a tab on the end of the
cash sheets called Vouchers this gives you the totals

Any questions please just give me a call


James

snippet: Dear Jonathan I am writing to you in relation to a possible road closure for Maynooth on Friday 12th
subject: Cathedral, Maynooth
plain_content:
Dear Jonathan

I am writing to you in relation to a possible road closure for Maynooth on
Friday 12th June 2015.

I have CC'd both Darryl Kavanagh and Sargent Paul Kealy on this mail.

June 12th is the opening night of the new bar, grill and smokehouse called
Cathedral.
Back in 2009 when we opened Mantra initially, we had over 5,000 people of
all ages lining the streets, ...(content truncated)... traffic on the
night.
Further to the conversation with Darryl, I am to understand that you would
contact Sargent Paul Kealy directly to discuss this further.
Once this is done, please get back to me in relation to any queries,
questions or paperwork etc. that you may require from us.

I look forward to hearing from you

Kind Regards

Niamh Hamrock
Cathedral
0872606408
markdown_content:
Dear Jonathan  
  

I am writing to you in relation to a possible road closure for Maynooth on Friday 12th June 2015.  
  

I have CC'd both Darryl Kavanagh and Sargent Paul Kealy on this mail.  

  

June 12th is the opening night of the new bar, grill and smokehouse called Cathedral.   

Back in 2009 when we opened Mantra initially, we had over 5,000 people of all ages lining ...(content truncated)...  
Further to the conversation with Darryl, I am to understand that you would contact Sargent Paul Kealy directly to discuss this further.   

Once this is done, please get back to me in relation to any queries, questions or paperwork etc. that you may require from us.   
  

I look forward to hearing from you  
  

Kind Regards  
  

Niamh Hamrock  

Cathedral  
0872606408

PRESS RELEASE
For immediate release
 
80 New Jobs in Maynooth and a two million euro injection to the local economy
 
An exciting new development is set to open on May 21stin Maynooth, Co Kildare bringing 80 new jobs, an investment of €2 million and a big boost to the local area.  Formerly known as Mantra, the 30,000 square foot multi level modern food and drink emporium ...(content truncated)...here is a gap in the North Kildare and West Dublin for a modern all-day style bar and venue tailored towards the over 23's market. The restaurantwill be a feast for the senses with an unusual twist to tantalize the taste buds.
 
To apply for positions, please forward CVs to xxx or see xxxx
ENDS
Press Contacts: Valerie Roe 086 2417094 | Valerie@valerieroe.com

Regards,
Darryl

subject: Goodbye mantra

Hiya,

I have put together memories of mantra and a few different promo things and competitions like

I also think we should have one more strong student night as I am getting a lot of mail about it. I think that we should hold this on the 22nd as the students will just be finished exams and we can market it as your chance you say goodbye to Mantra.

Let me know if there is anything else.

Kind regards

Laura Kavanagh
Mantra Garden Bar

Two London bars that might be design relevant to “aspects” of Mantra would be; -

- Nightjar, 129 City Rd, London EC1V JB (You’ll need to prebook a table)
- Milk and Honey, 61 Poland St, London W1F 7NU

Regards,
Darryl

- Nightjar, 129 City Rd, London EC1V JB (You’ll need to prebook a table)
- Milk and Honey, 61 Poland St, London W1F 7NU

What I was going to propose to you Re: design approach for Mantra (given what the research threw up - variety of bars etc) was to split the interior d...(content truncated)... well formed (fully fledged) bar concepts for the garden bar areas ground and first floor - based around those satellite bars.

To me this is the clever way to approach this. It will get you the mix and variety of bars you need. Otherwise you stand the risk of it all being one big giant super pub again with one scheme throughout.

We can discuss Friday…

Cheers,

KEITH
